title: Marketing Operation Specialist
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly organized regional Marketing Operation Specialist for our Global Marketing Team. In this role, you will support marketing and business initiatives across multiple markets with a focus on project coordination, campaign execution, partner and vendor collaboration, and operational support. This is a position that works cross-functionally to ensure smooth delivery of marketing programs, events, and strategic initiatives, while contributing to research, reporting, and process improvement efforts.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support the planning and execution of marketing and business initiatives across regional markets.
  • Coordinate with internal teams and external partners to deliver campaigns, events, and partnership programs.
  • Manage project timelines, deliverables, and cross-market stakeholder communications.
  • Assist in campaign rollout, content coordination, and promotional activities across regional markets.
  • Prepare reports, presentations, and internal documentation to support planning and decision-making.
  • Conduct market and competitor research to support regional strategy and program development.
  • Liaise with vendors and partners on marketing materials and related deliverables.
  • Support operational processes related to regional marketing projects and cross-team initiatives.

Qualifications & Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or related fields.
  • 0-2 years of working experience in an office environment, including internship experience. Fresh graduates are highly encouraged to apply.
  • A high degree of "teachability"—someone with excellent learning and comprehension abilities with a strong sense of responsibility and attention to detail.
  • Good communication, stakeholder management, and project coordination skills.
  • Fluency in English and Chinese (both written and spoken) is required to communicate effectively with our regional internal teams and external partners.

postedCompany.description:
The Loud Clan is a boutique marketing agency with a niche in the financial space.  


Made up of a team of marketing specialists, we offer digital advertising and marketing consultancy services with a single goal to amplify our customer's products and campaigns. 


Together, our voices and individual strengths turn everyday conversations into successful marketing initiatives.
postedCompany.name: THE LOUD CLAN PTE. LTD.
